factions.name: The Archive Order
factions.goal: Understand Orbets and document the Wanderers. Scholarly, analytical.

factions.name: The Sovereign Dominion
factions.goal: Capture Orbets to dominate worlds. Imperial, expansionist.

factions.name: The Wanderer Cult
factions.goal: Worship players as divine. Fanatical, reverent.

factions.name: The Null Syndicate
factions.goal: Destroy Orbets to prevent reality collapse. Secret, apocalyptic.
